name: n8n-mcp-skills
description: Expert skills for building n8n workflows

plugins.name: n8n-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Complete bundle: 8 expert skills for building flawless n8n workflows using the n8n-mcp MCP server (expression syntax, MCP tools usage, workflow patterns, validation, node configuration, JavaScript code, Python code, and the AI-agent Custom Code Tool), plus an always-on router skill and a hooks enforcement layer that surfaces the right skill at the moment of decision.
